overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a character navigating a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The character crosses a wet street under a large green neon sign, walks along sidewalks with digital billboards, ascends a prominent red outdoor staircase, and traverses an elevated covered walkway with glass walls overlooking the city traffic below.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with neon signage and wet reflective streets

events.description: green sports car drives past on the right side of the crosswalk
purple sedan passes by on the left side of the intersection
character turns left to exit the crosswalk and approach the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the wide yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk beneath the large green neon sign

notable_agents.action: green sports car driving through the intersection from right to left
pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead of the character toward the far side of the street

entered.detail: large green neon sign spelling 'softsys' mounted on the building overhang above the street
wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow and black diagonal stripes on wet asphalt
dark modern building with horizontal architectural lines and illuminated windows
illuminated advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics on the building wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet futuristic city street at night, dominated by a massive green 'softsys' neon sign overhead. The character walks across a wide yellow-striped crosswalk as futuristic vehicles pass by on either side. The wet asphalt reflects the neon lights, creating a cyberpunk atmosphere with moderate traffic and sparse pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with continuous digital advertising displays and approaching staircase structure

events.description: character steps onto the sidewalk and turns left to walk alongside the building
character slows slightly while navigating past pedestrians and approaching the red staircase

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk parallel to the street, passing illuminated digital billboards mounted on the building wall

notable_agents.action: person carrying a glowing blue umbrella walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk
person standing near the wall looking at the digital displays

entered.detail: series of pink and red illuminated digital billboards mounted on the building wall at eye level
large distinctive red outdoor staircase with green structural supports leading up to an elevated walkway
green and black public waste bins positioned along the building wall

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the street to the sidewalk, walking past a wall of glowing pink and red digital advertisements. The wet concrete reflects the neon lights from across the street. Ahead, a massive red staircase structure with green accents becomes increasingly prominent as the character approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor staircase with red treads and green railings connecting street level to elevated walkway

events.description: character begins ascending the red staircase steps
character reaches the top of the stairs and enters the covered elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide red-painted staircase with green metal railings, following other pedestrians upward

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt and dark pants climbing the stairs ahead of the character
figure in dark clothing waiting at the top landing near the entrance to the covered walkway

entered.detail: broad red-painted concrete steps with textured surfaces for traction
green painted metal handrails and support structures lining both sides of the staircase
concrete and metal bridge structure with green structural beams spanning overhead

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the distinctive red staircase, moving from the open street into a more enclosed environment under the green metal structure. Other pedestrians climb ahead, and the view opens up toward the elevated walkway entrance at the top. The lighting shifts from open neon to a mix of ambient and artificial as the character climbs higher.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated covered pedestrian walkway with glass walls overlooking the street and digital storefronts

events.description: entering the fully covered section with overhead fluorescent panel lighting replacing the ambient street glow
passing by a seated individual on a bench and various vending machines along the right wall

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered elevated corridor, passing other pedestrians and looking out through the glass walls at the street below

notable_agents.action: person in white coat walking ahead in the corridor, occasionally looking at the displays
person sitting on a blue bench against the glass wall, looking at a handheld device

entered.detail: grid of fluorescent ceiling panels and exposed concrete beams providing overhead cover
transparent glass barrier running along the left side overlooking the street level below with neon light reflections
continuous horizontal pink neon tubes running along the edge of the glass overlook
illuminated red and blue automated retail machines lined against the right wall
suspended digital billboard displaying animated advertisements hanging from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the elevated covered walkway, a long corridor with a tiled floor and ceiling panels. To the left, glass walls provide a view of the neon-lit street below, while the right side features vending machines and digital displays. The environment is moderately crowded with pedestrians, and pink neon lighting accents the walkway edges. The character continues forward through this sheltered urban passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked city street up into a sheltered, elevated urban corridor. It begins with the character crossing a wide yellow-striped crosswalk beneath a massive green neon sign, where the wet asphalt mirrors the vibrant city lights. As the character moves onto the sidewalk, the scene shifts past a wall of glowing pink and red digital advertisements before approaching a prominent red staircase. The camera then ascends these stairs, transitioning from the open street into a more enclosed environment under a green metal structure as the lighting shifts toward artificial ambient tones. Finally, the movement flows into a long, covered walkway with tiled floors and glass walls that overlook the neon traffic below, passing vending machines and digital displays under pink neon accents.
